description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CPP CI that runs on every pull request, ignoring changes to markdown files and Dockerfiles. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels in-progress workflows for the same pull request. It should have two jobs, build_ubuntu and build_windows, each running on a different environment, with a build matrix for Debug and Release configurations. For each job, install dependencies, checkout the repository with submodules, build the project with cmake, and run unit tests.
